# Notice of the Ministry of Education on the Issuance of the Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientifc Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities
## and Social Sciences)
Education and Social Sciences Department No. [2009] 1

To the education departments (education commissions) of all provinces, autonomous regions and municipalities directly under the central government, the education bureau of the municipalities with separate plans, the education bureau of the Xinjiang Production and Construction Corps, and the higher education institutions under the Ministry of Education:

In order to commend the researchers who have made outstanding contributions in the research of humanities and social sciences in colleges and universities, encourage the researchers in colleges and universities to take Marxism as their guide, insist on linking theory with practice, actively carry out scientific research, be brave in innovation, vigorously promote the innovation of discipline system, academic viewpoints and scientific research methods, and better play the role of a think tank for the cause of the Party and the people and serve the cause of building socialism with Chinese characteristics, the Ministry of Education, on the basis of the revision of the Based on the revision of the Interim Measures for Awarding Outstanding Achievements in Humanities and Social Sciences Research of Chinese

# Notice of the Ministry of Education on the Issuance of the Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientifc Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities  

## and Social Sciences)  

Education and Social Sciences Department No. [2009] 1  

To the education departments (education commissions) of all provinces, autonomous regions and municipalities directly under the central government, the education bureau of the municipalities with separate plans, the education bureau of the Xinjiang Production and Construction Corps, and the higher education institutions under the Ministry of Education:  

In order to commend the researchers who have made outstanding contributions in the research of humanities and social sciences in colleges and universities, encourage the researchers in colleges and universities to take Marxism as their guide, insist on linking theory with practice, actively carry out scientific research, be brave in innovation, vigorously promote the innovation of discipline system, academic viewpoints and scientific research methods, and better play the role of a think tank for the cause of the Party and the people and serve the cause of building socialism with Chinese characteristics, the Ministry of Education, on the basis of the revision of the Based on the revision of the Interim Measures for Awarding Outstanding Achievements in Humanities and Social Sciences Research of Chinese

text_blocks.text_content: Universities, the Ministry has formulated the Measures for Awarding Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences), which are hereby issued to you for implementation from the date of issuance.
Appendix: Awards for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research in Higher Education (Humanities and Social Sciences)
Ministry of Education of the People's Republic of China March 12, 2009

Universities, the Ministry has formulated the Measures for Awarding Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences), which are hereby issued to you for implementation from the date of issuance.  

Appendix: Awards for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research in Higher Education (Humanities and Social Sciences)  

Ministry of Education of the People's Republic of China  March 12, 2009

text_blocks.text_content: Appendix:
# Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences)
## Chapter I General Provisions

Article 1 In order to reward researchers who have made outstanding contributions in the field of humanities and social sciences, encourage active exploration and innovation, promote the prosperity of humanities and social sciences in colleges and universities, and better serve the construction of socialism with Chinese characteristics, the Ministry of Education has established the Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research in Colleges and Universities (Humanities and Social Sciences), and has formulated these measures.

Article 2 The Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research in Higher Education (Humanities and Social Sciences) is guided by Marxism- Leninism, Mao Zedong Thought, Deng Xiaoping Theory and the important thought of the "Three Represents", the in- depth implementation of the scientific outlook on development, the direction of serving the people, serving socialism and the policy of blossoming of a hundred flowers and contending with a hundred schools of thought, and insisting on emancipating the mind, seeking truth from facts and advancing with the times.

Article 3 Awards for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research of Institutions of higher Learning (humanities and social Sciences) shall be selected every three years and shall include the following awards:
Awards for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research of Institutions of higher Learning (humanities and Social Sciences);
Paper Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research of Universities (Humanities and Social Sciences);
Research Report Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research of Institutions of higher Learning (humanities and social Sciences).

In order to promote the popularization of Marxism and the dissemination and popularization of knowledge of humanities and social sciences, the Awards for the Popularization of Outstanding Achievements in scientific research of institutions of higher learning (humanities and social sciences) have been established.

Appendix:  

# Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences)  

## Chapter I General Provisions  

Article 1 In order to reward researchers who have made outstanding contributions in the field of humanities and social sciences, encourage active exploration and innovation, promote the prosperity of humanities and social sciences in colleges and universities, and better serve the construction of socialism with Chinese characteristics, the Ministry of Education has established the Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research in Colleges and Universities (Humanities and Social Sciences), and has formulated these measures.  

Article 2 The Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research in Higher Education (Humanities and Social Sciences) is guided by Marxism- Leninism, Mao Zedong Thought, Deng Xiaoping Theory and the important thought of the "Three Represents", the in- depth implementation of the scientific outlook on development, the direction of serving the people, serving socialism and the policy of blossoming of a hundred flowers and contending with a hundred schools of thought, and insisting on emancipating the mind, seeking truth from facts and advancing with the times.  

Article 3 Awards for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research of Institutions of higher Learning (humanities and social Sciences) shall be selected every three years and shall include the following awards:  

Awards for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research of Institutions of higher Learning (humanities and Social Sciences);  

Paper Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research of Universities (Humanities and Social Sciences);  

Research Report Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research of Institutions of higher Learning (humanities and social Sciences).  

In order to promote the popularization of Marxism and the dissemination and popularization of knowledge of humanities and social sciences, the Awards for the Popularization of Outstanding Achievements in scientific research of institutions of higher learning (humanities and social sciences) have been established.

text_blocks.text_content: All awards are divided into grand prizes, first prizes, second prizes and third prizes.

Article 4 The Ministry of Education shall set up an Award committee for Excellence in Scientific Research (Humanities and Social Sciences) of Institutions of higher Learning (hereinafter referred to as the Award Committee), which shall be composed of the director, deputy directors of the Social Sciences Committee of the Ministry of Education, the convenors of each department and the heads of the departments, bureaus and units concerned of the Ministry of Education. The award committee shall be responsible for examining and approving the award evaluation scheme, employing the experts of the evaluation committee, drawing up the list of winners and award levels, etc.

Article 5 The evaluation committee shall be responsible for the evaluation in accordance with the provisions of these Measures. The experts of the evaluation committee shall, according to the distribution of disciplines and other specific conditions of the applied projects, select experts and scholars with high academic attainments and excellent style of study from the whole country.

Article 6 The office of the Award Committee shall be set up in the Department of Social Sciences of the Ministry of Education, and it shall be authorized by the Award Committee to be responsible for the organization of the award evaluation and other specific work.
## Chapter II Application Conditions and Organization

Article 7 All general institutions of higher education can recommend the declaration as required. The qualifications of applicants are: teachers and researchers (including retired staff) whose official personnel relations are in higher education institutions during the period when the results are publicly published, published or submitted to the actual work department for research and consultation.

Article 8 The recommended declared achievements include books (including monographs, tools, ancient books, translations), dissertations, research reports (including research reports, consulting reports, etc.) and popularization achievements (except teaching materials, teaching aids and literary and artistic works).

Article 9 The applicant shall fill in the application form and apply to the school where he/she belongs. The application materials must be authentic and reliable and conform to the relevant provisions of the State on intellectual property protection.

Article 10 Local colleges and universities and institutions under other ministries and commissions shall be subject to the Department of Education (Education Commission) of the province, autonomous region or municipality directly under the Central Government as the unit, and colleges and universities directly under the Ministry of Education shall be subject to the school as the unit (hereinafter referred to as the application unit). After summarizing and

All awards are divided into grand prizes, first prizes, second prizes and third prizes.  

Article 4 The Ministry of Education shall set up an Award committee for Excellence in Scientific Research (Humanities and Social Sciences) of Institutions of higher Learning (hereinafter referred to as the Award Committee), which shall be composed of the director, deputy directors of the Social Sciences Committee of the Ministry of Education, the convenors of each department and the heads of the departments, bureaus and units concerned of the Ministry of Education. The award committee shall be responsible for examining and approving the award evaluation scheme, employing the experts of the evaluation committee, drawing up the list of winners and award levels, etc.  

Article 5 The evaluation committee shall be responsible for the evaluation in accordance with the provisions of these Measures. The experts of the evaluation committee shall, according to the distribution of disciplines and other specific conditions of the applied projects, select experts and scholars with high academic attainments and excellent style of study from the whole country.  

Article 6 The office of the Award Committee shall be set up in the Department of Social Sciences of the Ministry of Education, and it shall be authorized by the Award Committee to be responsible for the organization of the award evaluation and other specific work.  

## Chapter II Application Conditions and Organization  

Article 7 All general institutions of higher education can recommend the declaration as required. The qualifications of applicants are: teachers and researchers (including retired staff) whose official personnel relations are in higher education institutions during the period when the results are publicly published, published or submitted to the actual work department for research and consultation.  

Article 8 The recommended declared achievements include books (including monographs, tools, ancient books, translations), dissertations, research reports (including research reports, consulting reports, etc.) and popularization achievements (except teaching materials, teaching aids and literary and artistic works).  

Article 9 The applicant shall fill in the application form and apply to the school where he/she belongs. The application materials must be authentic and reliable and conform to the relevant provisions of the State on intellectual property protection.  

Article 10 Local colleges and universities and institutions under other ministries and commissions shall be subject to the Department of Education (Education Commission) of the province, autonomous region or municipality directly under the Central Government as the unit, and colleges and universities directly under the Ministry of Education shall be subject to the school as the unit (hereinafter referred to as the application unit). After summarizing and

text_blocks.text_content: examining the application materials, the application units shall submit them to the office of the Award Committee within the prescribed date. The office of the award Committee will not accept individual declaration materials.

Article 11 The office of the award Committee shall conduct formal examination of the recommended application materials, and the main contents of the examination shall be whether the scope of the recommended award, the form of the results and the application form meet the requirements. All the recommended materials will be publicized on the "Network of Humanities and Social Sciences in Chinese Universities."
## Chapter III Evaluation Criteria

Article 12 The awarded results must adhere to Marxism as the guide, have a clear viewpoint, sufficient arguments, informative information, accurate data, strict logic, scientific methods, be innovative and cutting- edge, conform to academic ethics and academic norms, and reflect the unity of political and academic standards.

Article 13 The award- winning achievements in the category of basic research should have made theoretical achievements and academic innovations, filled some gaps in the field of research, promoted discipline construction and theoretical development, and received attention and praise from the academic community.

Article 14 Prize- winning achievements in the category of applied research shall make breakthroughs in solving major practical problems in national and regional economic and social development, provide decision- making consultation opinions and suggestions with important reference value for the Party, relevant government departments at all levels, enterprises and institutions, and produce significant economic and social benefits.

Article 15 The prize- winning achievements in the category of popularization shall be scientific, knowledgeable and readable, and produce good social effects in propagating the Party's innovative theories, explaining and answering the hot and difficult issues concerned by the people, and spreading and popularizing the knowledge of humanities and social sciences.
## Chapter IV Review Principles and Procedures

Article 16 The evaluation work adheres to the principles of quality first, preferring lack to abuse and openness, fairness and impartiality. The evaluation work to implement the recusal system, the declarant does not participate in the award committee and evaluation committee.

Article 17 The evaluation takes the form of centralized independent evaluation. According to the evaluation criteria stipulated in this method, the experts of the Jury independently evaluate the qualitative and quantitative evaluation of the application materials, and make

examining the application materials, the application units shall submit them to the office of the Award Committee within the prescribed date. The office of the award Committee will not accept individual declaration materials.  

Article 11 The office of the award Committee shall conduct formal examination of the recommended application materials, and the main contents of the examination shall be whether the scope of the recommended award, the form of the results and the application form meet the requirements. All the recommended materials will be publicized on the "Network of Humanities and Social Sciences in Chinese Universities."  

## Chapter III Evaluation Criteria  

Article 12 The awarded results must adhere to Marxism as the guide, have a clear viewpoint, sufficient arguments, informative information, accurate data, strict logic, scientific methods, be innovative and cutting- edge, conform to academic ethics and academic norms, and reflect the unity of political and academic standards.  

Article 13 The award- winning achievements in the category of basic research should have made theoretical achievements and academic innovations, filled some gaps in the field of research, promoted discipline construction and theoretical development, and received attention and praise from the academic community.  

Article 14 Prize- winning achievements in the category of applied research shall make breakthroughs in solving major practical problems in national and regional economic and social development, provide decision- making consultation opinions and suggestions with important reference value for the Party, relevant government departments at all levels, enterprises and institutions, and produce significant economic and social benefits.  

Article 15 The prize- winning achievements in the category of popularization shall be scientific, knowledgeable and readable, and produce good social effects in propagating the Party's innovative theories, explaining and answering the hot and difficult issues concerned by the people, and spreading and popularizing the knowledge of humanities and social sciences.  

## Chapter IV Review Principles and Procedures  

Article 16 The evaluation work adheres to the principles of quality first, preferring lack to abuse and openness, fairness and impartiality. The evaluation work to implement the recusal system, the declarant does not participate in the award committee and evaluation committee.  

Article 17 The evaluation takes the form of centralized independent evaluation. According to the evaluation criteria stipulated in this method, the experts of the Jury independently evaluate the qualitative and quantitative evaluation of the application materials, and make

text_blocks.text_content: recommendations for the award candidates and award levels. Award Committee Office to review the recommendations of the Jury on the award candidates and award levels.

Article 18 The Award Committee held a plenary session to listen to the report of the Award Committee Office on the work of the Award, and finalize the list of award- winning achievements and award levels.
Article 19 The list of prize- winning achievements will be publicized on "China University Humanities and Social Sciences Network" for one month from the date of publication.
Article 20 The Award committee shall report the award evaluation results to the Ministry of Education, which shall approve, publish the award evaluation results and award the awards.
## Chapter V Objection and Treatment

Article 21 During the period of public notice, any unit or individual who has objections can be submitted to the Office of the Award Committee. Objections should be made in written form (including the necessary supporting materials). Unit objections must be in the objection material stamped with the official seal of the unit, and write the name of the contact person, mailing address and telephone; individual objections, must sign the real name on the objection material, and write my work unit, mailing address and telephone. Does not meet the provisions of this paragraph and the requirements of the objection will not be accepted.

The Award Committee Office of the objection to the material organization expert's investigation, processing opinions and reported to the Award Committee for consideration and decision. Award Committee Office of the objection to the units and individuals to give confidentiality.

Article 22 Where a recommending unit or individual provides false data and materials to assist others to defraud awards, the office of the award Committee shall verify it and circulate a notice of criticism or cancel its qualification for participation in the evaluation.

Article 23 Those who plagiarize others' scientific research achievements or fraudulently obtain awards by other improper means shall be revoked of their awards and recover their award certificates and bonuses after verification by the award committee and approval by the Ministry of Education.

Article 24 The relevant personnel involved in the award evaluation activities who practice fraud, practice favoritism and divulge secrets during the evaluation activities shall be punished according to the relevant regulations.
## Chapter VI Supplementary Provisions

## Chapter VI Supplementary Provisions

text_blocks.text_content: Article 25 These Measures shall come into force as of the date of promulgation and shall be interpreted by the office of the Award Committee. The original Interim Measures for Rewarding Achievements of Humanities and Social Science Research in Chinese Universities shall be abolished at the same time.
